expectations.evidence: 'The levy axis moves from open question to known fact: it passed, by a lot.' No levy branch appears anywhere after that sentence.
expectations.text: landing-promoted-to-known: the levy result moves to the known pile and the response never re-branches on the levy

expectations.evidence: 'Two unknowns collapsing to one turns the four original futures into a simple fork' — exactly two worlds, visa renews or not.
expectations.text: space-halves: only the worlds consistent with the levy passing remain in play — the two worlds on the visa axis — not a rebuilt four-world grid

expectations.evidence: Eleven short paragraphs of prose, no question march, no table. The prior recommendation's rationale is inherited and reframed ('the levy risk and the visa risk were doing two different jobs') rather than re-derived.
expectations.text: lighter-rerun: the refresh runs visibly lighter than a full chain march; ground the prior walk already settled is inherited, not re-derived at length

expectations.evidence: 'The hinge going forward is the visa decision itself, landing late August' — paired with a concrete switch: if a milestone needs the senior dev before August, line up a named backup now.
expectations.text: visa-hinge-carried: the remaining watchpoint (the late-August visa decision) survives as the named hinge, paired with the switch it would trigger

expectations.evidence: 'So yes, it still holds: take the contract, keep the payments milestone-based... Check the visa timeline against your milestone dates, and this decision is settled until August.' The close is the commitment plus its one named check.
expectations.text: refreshed-commitment: ends on a committed updated recommendation — hold or amend the milestone-based advice — with nothing trailing it
